context: Tests whether the agent correctly implements seller onboarding using Stripe Connect Express accounts, generates the proper onboarding link type, and checks the right conditions before activating a seller.

checklist.name: Express account type
checklist.description: stripe.accounts.create is called with type: 'express' (not 'standard' or 'custom')

checklist.name: Transfers capability requested
checklist.description: The accounts.create call includes capabilities: { transfers: { requested: true } }

checklist.name: Payout schedule propagated
checklist.description: The accounts.create call includes settings.payouts.schedule.interval set from the seller's payout_schedule field

checklist.name: account_onboarding link type
checklist.description: stripe.accountLinks.create is called with type: 'account_onboarding' (not 'account_update' or another type)

checklist.name: refresh_url included
checklist.description: The accountLinks.create call includes a refresh_url parameter

checklist.name: return_url included
checklist.description: The accountLinks.create call includes a return_url parameter

checklist.name: Reuses existing account
checklist.description: If stripe_account_id is already set on the seller, the code skips account creation and reuses the existing ID

checklist.name: Saves stripe_account_id
checklist.description: After creating a new Stripe account, stripe_account_id is persisted back to the seller record in the database

checklist.name: Both conditions checked for activation
checklist.description: The webhook handler checks BOTH charges_enabled AND payouts_enabled before setting seller status to 'active' — not just one of the two

checklist.name: Activation email sent
checklist.description: An email is sent to the seller after their status is set to 'active' (e.g. using a 'seller-account-approved' or equivalent template)

checklist.name: No double activation
checklist.description: The webhook handler does NOT update the seller's status if they are already 'active' (guards against repeated webhook delivery)
